attacking_style: Does not attack for stage wins; instead methodically targets classification points from breakaways across multiple categorized climbs throughout the stage.
team_tactics: Operates independently in breakaways with autonomy to pursue classification objectives rather than stage results, suggesting team support for alternative goals.
terrain_preference: Categorized climbs where KOM points are available. Demonstrates superior climbing legs capable of repeatedly distancing rivals across multiple ascents in a single stage.
vulnerability: Unlikely to contest sprint finishes or stage victories; classification focus means vulnerable to being marked by dedicated rivals in breakaways.
key_patterns: Targets KOM classifications systematically, collecting points on all categorized climbs (evidenced in 2 races)
Races from breakaways rather than main peloton, prioritizing classification over stage results (2 observations)
Shows disciplined restraint, not wasting energy contesting stage when classifications are the objective (2 races)
form_trajectory: positive: demonstrated superior climbing form in most recent race, defeating motivated rival across all four KOMs
